product_results.title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max, 256GB, Black Titanium - Unlocked (Renewed)

summary.text: Customers find the cellular phone arrives in great condition and good as new. They describe it as a good phone that is flawless in quality. However, customers experience issues with the sim card port and compatibility. Opinions vary regarding the screen condition, battery life, performance, and charging cable, with customers having different experiences in these areas.

authors_reviews.title: Great quality, as expected! Very happy.
authors_reviews.text: Came in great condition. One very small scratch, otherwise perfect! Working very well so far, very happy with this purchase. Will come back to this seller in the future if no issues arise.
authors_reviews.author: Jeff Sanderson

authors_reviews.title: Multiple scratches et eSim au lieu de carte SIM.
authors_reviews.text: L'annonce mentionne un "excellent" état mais il y a de multiples scratchs sur la vitre et 3 endroits brisé à la limite entre la vitre et la bordure du téléphone. L'état du cellulaire aurait dû être "correct".Autre chose, l'image 3D montre l'emplacement de la carte SD mais seulement eSim est disponible sur le téléphone reçu. Fausse représentation.
authors_reviews.author: Simon Rioux

authors_reviews.title: Better than expected
authors_reviews.text: Better than expected, Case was nearly new, only minor scratches on corners of case. Battery has 90% health. Well cleaned & package is professional level. Would definitely buy from Refurb Deals again. Very good.
authors_reviews.author: rachel wu

authors_reviews.title: Good phone
authors_reviews.text: Bought renewed iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB Blue Titanium from Amazon. Phone is good, it is working properly and is indeed in excellent condition except for couple of things like two scratches on the screen which are visible and it was not cleaned properly near rear camera area. Other than that the USB port, speaker and mic ports are clean and overall phone looks good.
authors_reviews.author: Jaspreet Singh

authors_reviews.title: Flawless Phone
authors_reviews.text: I can’t believe how nice this phone came. The battery is at half-life which is not bad not a single scratch or blemish on this phone. Super happy with my purchase.
authors_reviews.author: William Iles

authors_reviews.title: Awesome deal!
authors_reviews.text: Got this for my wife. She had a 62gb iPhone 12.I was very happy to see the phone show up looking brand new!Works great, she's had it for about a week now. Runs smoothStorage is killerShe is so happy to be able to take a billion photos a day lol also has room for all her apps and what not. She's happy. I'm happy.
authors_reviews.author: Marco Hennebury

authors_reviews.title: Cord and box
authors_reviews.text: It came with the wrong charging cord and there was no charging power adaptor.
authors_reviews.author: Adrian W.

authors_reviews.title: Très mauvaise expérience
authors_reviews.text: J’ai eu un téléphone très abîmé avec une batterie en dessous de 80% alors que selon l’état du reconditionnement elle devrait être soit à 80 ou plus et avec très peu de dommage visible alors quand réalité, les coins du téléphone sont complètement défoncé de plus pour le retour je dois payer les frais et espérer être remboursé alors que la description dit retour gratuit alors si vous acheter dite vous que si vous avez un problème vous devrez espérer être remboursé de a à z parce que vous renvoyer un téléphone à vos frais même s’il ne s’agit pas de votre faute s’il n’est pas en bon état par rapport à ce qui est annoncée et en plus vous devez payer le retour qui est indiqué gratuit
authors_reviews.author: Viny
